name: Ruiner Update [and Maud]
description:
"You had to give them all a sign, didn't you?"

Surprise new updates regarding the moderation of MLP bots have made me a little concerned about my place here. So, all of my current bots are also on another site, and I will be backing them up elsewhere as well. I will keep making bots here (no romance ones it seems, though those were rare as is, and I had none planned anyway) for as long as I can because I'm stubborn.

I have also seen other creators upset with users using their bot definitions without permission. I'm going to clear this up and say if you want to copy/paste mine, do it. It would be nice if you could credit me, but honestly, use them, edit them, improve them - go wild.

Anyway, because update "bots" flood search results for no reason, this is also a Maud Pie bot. Why? Maud is based, that's why.
creator: The Ruiner
